title: Authors and Citation
text: Revilla Sancho L (2026). val.report: Validation Reports. R package version 0.0.0.9007, https://github.com/pharmaR/val.report.
code: @Manual{,   title = {val.report: Validation Reports},   author = {Lluís {Revilla Sancho}},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9007},   url = {https://github.com/pharmaR/val.report}, }

title: Validation Reports
text: documents package validation checks

title: Validation Reports
text: can install development version val.report GitHub :

title: Validation Reports
text: Generate reports easily ’ve given val.meter permission download packages network, passing simply package name pull latest version package repository evaluation. ’d like prescriptive, can also pass local source code directory package archive (.tar.gz .zip). package_report accepts input can converted val.meter::pkg object. [!NOTE] continuing add supported input types. Currently, locally source code directories best support cover concrete use case. plan improve support user-friendly inputs packages name .tar.gz url.
code: library(val.report)  options(   width = 80L,   val.meter.logs = TRUE,   val.meter.policy = val.meter::policy(permissions = TRUE) )  package_report("praise")

title: Validation Reports
text: repository vendors R Validation Hub quarto template, included git submodule. Submodules require slightly different syntax order included. cloning, sure use:

what: Handler for complex option passing through from a quarto parameter — knitr_update_options
title: Handler for complex option passing through from a quarto parameter — knitr_update_options
text: Importantly, handles S7::new_class() objects passed quarto command-line parameter can deparsed. helper allows passing arbitrary expressions using !expr prefix, standardized yaml.

title: Handler for complex option passing through from a quarto parameter — knitr_update_options
Handler for complex option passing through from a quarto parameter — knitr_update_options
text: opts list options. non-serializable values fail using preferred interface knitr, may pass expression string "!expr mtcars". Notably, quarto::quarto_render, attempts serialize objects passing command-line quarto, fail objects requires "!expr" prefix. envir environment expressions evaluated.

title: Handler for complex option passing through from a quarto parameter — knitr_update_options
text: opts list parsing complex expressions. function used primarily modifying global state calling options()

title: Handler for complex option passing through from a quarto parameter — knitr_update_options
text: val.report knitr utilities exported use reports maintained R Validation Hub. choose use functions purposes, aware considered stable broader use.

title: Handler for complex option passing through from a quarto parameter — knitr_update_options
code: # in a knitr document, we'll imagine we have some `params` object that we # want to use to set options: params <- list(options = list(   # most objects can be passed just fine   example_1 = list(a = 1L, b = "two"),    # but objects that cannot be deserialized from their serialized (using,   # for example [`dput()`], [`dump()`], and [`deparse()`]) expression would   # fail as they are attempted to be passed to the `quarto` command-line   # utility.   complex_option = '!expr S7::new_class("example")()' ))  knitr_update_options(params$options) #> $example_1 #> $example_1$a #> [1] 1 #>  #> $example_1$b #> [1] "two" #>  #>  #> $complex_option #> <example> #>

what: Generates an R Validation Hub package report — package_report
title: Generates an R Validation Hub package report — package_report
text: Generates R Validation Hub package report

title: Generates an R Validation Hub package report — package_report
code: package_report(   package = NULL,   session = NULL,   options = val_options(plus = c("width")),   template = NULL,   output_dir = getwd(),   quiet = FALSE,   ... )

title: Generates an R Validation Hub package report — package_report
text: package package name, source code file path, url path Rds file val.meter::pkg object . details accepted inputs, see val.meter::pkg. session list session information path Rds session object. NULL, session information derived package metrics calculated. error one package session provided Rds file. options Additional options use deriving package metrics. default, inherits val.* options well select global environment variables. template quarto template file use. See details information. output_dir character(1L) directory path rendered files generated. Defaults current working directory. quiet logical(1L) flag indicating whether output emitted console rendering report. ... Additional arguments passed quarto::quarto_render()

title: Generates an R Validation Hub package report — package_report
text: function uses pre-built quarto extension provides template document. replace existing template without changes, ensure template exposes parameters. Custom templates likely want begin copy original report.

title: Generates an R Validation Hub package report — package_report
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ options(   width = 80L,   val.meter.logs = TRUE,   val.meter.policy = val.meter::policy(permissions = TRUE) )  package_report(package = "path/to/package") } # }

$device.ask.default [1] FALSE  $devtools.ellipsis_action function (message = NULL, class = NULL, ..., body = NULL, footer = NULL,      parent = NULL, use_cli_format = NULL, .inherit = NULL, .frequency = c("always",          "regularly", "once"), .frequency_id = NULL, .subclass = deprecated())  {     message <- validate_signal_args(message, class, NULL, .subclass,          "warn")     message_info <- cnd_message_info(message, body, footer, caller_env(),          use_cli_format = use_cli_format)     message <- message_info$message     extra_fields <- message_info$extra_fields     use_cli_format <- message_info$use_cli_format     .frequency <- arg_match0(.frequency, c("always", "regularly",          "once"))     if (!needs_signal(.frequency, .frequency_id, warning_freq_env,          "rlib_warning_verbosity")) {         return(invisible(NULL))     }     if (!is_null(parent)) {         if (is_null(.inherit)) {             .inherit <- !inherits(parent, "error")         }         extra_fields$rlang <- c(extra_fields$rlang, list(inherit = .inherit))     }     cnd <- warning_cnd(class, message = message, !!!extra_fields,          use_cli_format = use_cli_format, parent = parent, ...)     cnd$footer <- c(cnd$footer, message_freq(message, .frequency,          "warning"))     local_long_messages()     warning(cnd) } <bytecode: 0x0000024754b80a88> <environment: namespace:rlang>
